training_status: minimally active (plays tennis 1-2x per week, no structured workouts)

benefits.description: Lost 15-16 lbs on Tirzepatide in 2 months; additional 5 lbs from Tesamorelin over past 3 weeks with noticeable reduction in abdominal and love handle fat

protocol_notes: On Tirzepatide for 3 months total, peptides (Tesamorelin) for almost 1 month. Maintaining caloric deficit under 1000 calories per day for most of 3 months. Height 5'11". Has not worked out structurally but plays tennis casually 1-2x weekly. Reports fat loss concentrated in abdominal region and love handles.
